name: mineru-paper-parser
description: Parse local research papers with MinerU precise batch API into per-paper Markdown and image folders.

interface.shortDescription: Parse papers into Markdown plus images.
interface.longDescription: MinerU Paper Parser packages a Codex skill for converting local PDF batches through MinerU's precise batch API. It reads a local MINERU_TOKEN from .env/mineru.env and writes organized outputs with one folder per paper containing the Markdown file and its images.
defaultPrompt: Parse papers in paper/ to parsed/.
Reuse this MinerU batch id and rebuild outputs.
Convert these PDFs into per-paper Markdown folders.
